indicator.label: Household debt, loans and debt securities
indicator.description: Total stock of loans and debt securities issued by households as a share of GDP.

caveats: IMF GDD is annual and broader than RBI bank-credit composition data.
HH_LS is household debt by loans and debt securities as a share of GDP.
Use this for international context, not for Indian loan-product composition.
